name: Upload Header Link
uri: client-side only — no route change; sets activeSection='upload' in App state
notes: Clicking 'Upload' calls onNavigate('upload'), a prop passed from App.jsx as this.handleNavigate.

App.handleNavigate sets this.state.activeSection = 'upload', which causes the Sidebar to highlight the Upload item; DocumentGrid (including its embedded upload area) is always rendered regardless of activeSection.
The Header component is only mounted when AuthContext.isAuthenticated is true; the entire app tree is replaced by LoginForm otherwise.
The onNavigate prop is guarded inline (onNavigate && onNavigate('upload')), so omitting the prop causes no crash.
